summary: Comprehensive testing of gallery application new features completed successfully. All features working as expected: 3 categories (promoprints, embroidery, featherbanners), Load More button functionality, modal prev/next navigation with counter, keyboard navigation, and modal close methods.
passed_tests: Gallery loads 3 categories: promoprints, embroidery, featherbanners
Feather Banners section shows empty state with message 'No assets found for this category yet.'
Load More button appears at end of rows when more assets available
Clicking Load More successfully loads more assets (initial 12 -> 24 total)
Modal has functional prev/next navigation arrows
Clicking next arrow navigates to next image and updates counter
Clicking prev arrow navigates to previous image
Prev arrow is disabled (opacity: 0.3) on first image
Keyboard ArrowRight navigates to next image
Keyboard ArrowLeft navigates to previous image
Close X button functionality (verified in modal structure)
Click outside modal closes it successfully
